analysis:
Based on your current opportunities:

**Best CSP:** NFLX $90 PUT, 2026-05-22 (31 DTE), $1.62/$1.64 bid/ask, 0.29 delta, 21.3% annualized return

**Best Position Income CC:** GOOGL $350 CALL, 2026-05-15 (24 DTE), $7.80/$8.10 bid/ask, 0.37 delta, 35.9% annualized return

**IVP Environment:** Elevated volatility across holdings (NFLX 90%, GOOGL 91%, AMZN 77%) creating strong premium collection opportunities, though some positions extended above MA50.
